name: HWR_SKILLS_SOURCE_B
description: This table will be used to store the list of potential sources for the skills.

columns.Name: SKILL_ID
columns.Comments: This is the Skill Source Id identifying the Skill Source entry in this table.

columns.Name: IS_ENABLED
columns.Comments: This indicates whether the skill source was enabled or not.

columns.Name: SKILL_ATTR_1
columns.Comments: SKILL_ATTR_1. This is the extra attribute in case if needed.

columns.Name: SKILL_ATTR_2
columns.Comments: SKILL_ATTR_2. This is the extra attribute in case if needed.

columns.Name: SKILL_ATTR_3
columns.Comments: SKILL_ATTR_3. This is the extra attribute in case if needed.

columns.Name: SKILL_ATTR_4
columns.Comments: SKILL_ATTR_4. This is the extra attribute in case if needed.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
